name: Instruction Following
description: Evaluates strict adherence to explicit instructions, format compliance, constraint adherence, and accuracy.

perspectives.name: Explicit Instructions
perspectives.criteria: Does the response follow all explicit instructions stated in the system and user prompts?
perspectives.scoringGuide: 1=Ignores instructions, 2=Follows few, 3=Follows most, 4=Follows all, 5=Perfectly follows with nuance

perspectives.name: Format Compliance
perspectives.criteria: Does the response use the requested format (JSON, markdown, list, etc.)?
perspectives.scoringGuide: 1=Wrong format, 2=Partial format, 3=Mostly correct format, 4=Correct format, 5=Perfect format with all details

perspectives.name: Constraint Adherence
perspectives.description: Length, tone, and scope constraints respected
perspectives.criteria: Does the response respect length, tone, and scope constraints?
perspectives.scoringGuide: 1=Ignores constraints, 2=Violates many, 3=Mostly adheres, 4=Adheres well, 5=Perfect constraint adherence

perspectives.name: No Hallucination
perspectives.criteria: Does the response avoid inventing facts, requirements, or instructions not present in the prompt?
